스바냐 3:1.content: Woe to her who is rebellious and polluted, the oppressing city!

스바냐 3:2.content: She didn’t obey the voice. She didn’t receive correction. She didn’t trust in Yahweh. She didn’t draw near to her God.

스바냐 3:3.content: Her princes within her are roaring lions. Her judges are evening wolves. They leave nothing until the next day.

스바냐 3:4.content: Her prophets are arrogant and treacherous people. Her priests have profaned the sanctuary. They have done violence to the law.

스바냐 3:5.content: Yahweh, within her, is righteous. He will do no wrong. Every morning he brings his justice to light. He doesn’t fail, but the unjust know no shame.

스바냐 3:6.content: I have cut off nations. Their battlements are desolate. I have made their streets waste, so that no one passes by. Their cities are destroyed, so that there is no man, so that there is no inhabitant.

스바냐 3:7.content: I said, “Just fear me. Receive correction, so that her dwelling won’t be cut off, according to all that I have appointed concerning her.” But they rose early and corrupted all their doings.

스바냐 3:8.content: “Therefore wait for me”, says Yahweh, “until the day that I rise up to the prey, for my determination is to gather the nations, that I may assemble the kingdoms, to pour on them my indignation, even all my fierce anger, for all the earth will be devoured with the fire of my jealousy.

스바냐 3:9.content: For then I will purify the lips of the peoples, that they may all call on Yahweh’s name, to serve him shoulder to shoulder.

스바냐 3:10.content: From beyond the rivers of Cush, my worshipers, even the daughter of my dispersed people, will bring my offering.

스바냐 3:11.content: In that day you will not be disappointed for all your doings, in which you have transgressed against me; for then I will take away out from among you your proudly exulting ones, and you will no more be arrogant in my holy mountain.

스바냐 3:12.content: But I will leave among you an afflicted and poor people, and they will take refuge in Yahweh’s name.

스바냐 3:13.content: The remnant of Israel will not do iniquity, nor speak lies, neither will a deceitful tongue be found in their mouth, for they will feed and lie down, and no one will make them afraid.”

스바냐 3:14.content: Sing, daughter of Zion! Shout, Israel! Be glad and rejoice with all your heart, daughter of Jerusalem.

스바냐 3:15.content: Yahweh has taken away your judgments. He has thrown out your enemy. The King of Israel, Yahweh, is among you. You will not be afraid of evil any more.

스바냐 3:16.content: In that day, it will be said to Jerusalem, “Don’t be afraid, Zion. Don’t let your hands be weak.”

스바냐 3:17.content: Yahweh, your God, is among you, a mighty one who will save. He will rejoice over you with joy. He will calm you in his love. He will rejoice over you with singing.

스바냐 3:18.content: I will remove those who grieve about the appointed feasts from you. They are a burden and a reproach to you.

스바냐 3:19.content: Behold, at that time I will deal with all those who afflict you, and I will save those who are lame, and gather those who were driven away. I will give them praise and honor, whose shame has been in all the earth.

스바냐 3:20.content: At that time I will bring you in, and at that time I will gather you; for I will give you honor and praise among all the peoples of the earth, when I restore your fortunes before your eyes, says Yahweh.
